---
title: "mETHYLotest - Episignature Scoring Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
    code_folding: hide
    df_print: paged
params:
  rds_file: "episignature_scores.rds"
---

```{=html}
<style>
.score-high  { color: #e74c3c; font-weight: bold; }
.score-mid   { color: #f39c12; font-weight: bold; }
.score-low   { color: #27ae60; }
.metric-row  { display: flex; gap: 15px; margin: 15px 0; }
.metric-card {
  flex: 1; text-align: center; padding: 15px;
  border-radius: 5px; background: #f5f5f5;
  border: 1px solid #e3e3e3;
}
.metric-card .value { font-size: 2em; font-weight: bold; }
.metric-card .label { color: #666; font-size: 0.9em; }
.method-box {
  background: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 5px;
  border-left: 4px solid #8e44ad; padding: 15px;
  margin: 15px 0;
}
</style>
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width  = 12,
  fig.height = 7,
  dpi = 100
)

library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(DT)
library(htmltools)
library(knitr)

if (!file.exists(params$rds_file))
  stop("Results file not found: ", params$rds_file)

df_res <- readRDS(params$rds_file)

samples    <- unique(df_res$Sample)
signatures <- unique(df_res$Signature)
```

# Overview

```{r overview_metrics}
n_samples <- length(samples)
n_sigs    <- length(signatures)
top_hit   <- df_res[which.max(df_res$Global_Score), ]

div(class = "metric-row",
    div(class = "metric-card",
        div(class = "value", n_samples),
        div(class = "label", "Samples Scored")),
    div(class = "metric-card",
        div(class = "value", n_sigs),
        div(class = "label", "Episignatures")),
    div(class = "metric-card",
        div(class = "value",
            paste0(top_hit$Global_Score, "%")),
        div(class = "label",
            paste0("Top Hit: ", top_hit$Sample,
                   " x ", top_hit$Signature)))
)
```

## Global Heatmap

The heatmap shows the **Global Score** (weighted percentage of significant
probes relative to the total signature size) for each sample-signature
combination. Red = strong match.

```{r heatmap, fig.height=max(5, n_sigs * 0.4 + 2), fig.width=max(8, n_samples * 0.8 + 3)}
mat <- reshape2::acast(df_res, Signature ~ Sample,
                        value.var = "Global_Score", fill = 0)

p_heat <- plot_ly(
  z = mat,
  x = colnames(mat),
  y = rownames(mat),
  type = "heatmap",
  colorscale = list(
    c(0, "#f7f7f7"), c(0.2, "#fde0dd"),
    c(0.5, "#fa9fb5"), c(0.8, "#c51b8a"),
    c(1, "#7a0177")),
  zmin = 0,
  zmax = max(mat, 100),
  hovertemplate = paste0(
    "Sample: %{x}<br>Signature: %{y}<br>",
    "Score: %{z:.1f}%<extra></extra>")
) %>%
  layout(
    title = "Episignature Global Score Heatmap",
    xaxis = list(title = "", tickangle = 45),
    yaxis = list(title = ""),
    margin = list(b = 120, l = 150))

p_heat
```

## Ranking Table

```{r ranking_table}
rank_df <- df_res[order(-df_res$Global_Score), ]
rank_df <- rank_df[, c("Sample", "Signature", "Global_Score",
                         "Pct_Significant", "Coverage_Pct",
                         "Significant", "Found", "Total_Probes")]

datatable(
  rank_df,
  rownames = FALSE,
  extensions = "Buttons",
  options = list(
    pageLength = 20, scrollX = TRUE,
    dom = "Bfrtip",
    buttons = c("copy", "csv", "excel"),
    order = list(list(2, "desc"))),
  colnames = c("Sample", "Signature", "Global Score (%)",
               "Significant (%)", "Coverage (%)",
               "Sig. Probes", "Found", "Total")
) %>%
  formatStyle(
    "Global_Score",
    background = styleColorBar(
      c(0, max(rank_df$Global_Score, 1)), "#fa9fb5"),
    backgroundSize = "98% 88%",
    backgroundRepeat = "no-repeat",
    backgroundPosition = "center"
  ) %>%
  formatStyle(
    "Coverage_Pct",
    background = styleColorBar(c(0, 100), "#a6d8f0"),
    backgroundSize = "98% 88%",
    backgroundRepeat = "no-repeat",
    backgroundPosition = "center"
  )
```

---

# Per-Sample Analysis {.tabset .tabset-pills}

```{r per_sample, results='asis'}
for (sample in samples) {

  cat(paste0("\n\n## ", sample, "\n\n"))

  sub <- df_res[df_res$Sample == sample, ]
  sub <- sub[order(-sub$Global_Score), ]

  # Metrics
  n_tested  <- nrow(sub)
  n_hits    <- sum(sub$Global_Score > 5)
  top_sig   <- if (nrow(sub) > 0) sub$Signature[1] else "None"
  top_score <- if (nrow(sub) > 0) sub$Global_Score[1] else 0

  cat('<div class="metric-row">')
  cat(paste0(
    '<div class="metric-card">',
    '<div class="value">', n_tested, '</div>',
    '<div class="label">Signatures Tested</div></div>'))
  cat(paste0(
    '<div class="metric-card">',
    '<div class="value">', n_hits, '</div>',
    '<div class="label">Hits (Score > 5%)</div></div>'))
  cat(paste0(
    '<div class="metric-card">',
    '<div class="value">', top_score, '%</div>',
    '<div class="label">Top: ', top_sig, '</div></div>'))
  cat('</div>\n\n')

  # Lollipop plot
  plot_sub <- sub[sub$Global_Score > 0, ]
  if (nrow(plot_sub) < 5)
    plot_sub <- head(sub, 20)

  plot_sub$Signature <- factor(
    plot_sub$Signature,
    levels = plot_sub$Signature[order(plot_sub$Global_Score)])

  n_items <- nrow(plot_sub)
  ph <- 400 + n_items * 25

  p <- ggplot(plot_sub,
              aes(x = Global_Score, y = Signature,
                  text = paste0(
                    "<b>", Signature, "</b>",
                    "<br>Global Score: ", Global_Score, "%",
                    "<br>Significant: ", Pct_Significant, "%",
                    "<br>Coverage: ", Coverage_Pct, "%",
                    "<br>Found: ", Found, "/", Total_Probes))) +
    geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = Global_Score,
                      y = Signature, yend = Signature),
                 color = "grey60") +
    geom_point(aes(color = Global_Score, size = Coverage_Pct)) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "magma", direction = -1) +
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 6), name = "Coverage %") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    labs(title = paste("Episignature Scores -", sample),
         x = "Global Score (%)", y = "") +
    theme(legend.position = "right")

  print(htmltools::tagList(
    ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text", height = ph)))

  cat("\n\n")

  # Table
  tbl_cols <- c("Signature", "Global_Score", "Pct_Significant",
                "Coverage_Pct", "Significant", "Found",
                "Missing", "Total_Probes")
  if ("Details" %in% colnames(sub))
    tbl_cols <- c(tbl_cols, "Details")

  tbl_data <- sub[, intersect(tbl_cols, colnames(sub))]
  uid <- paste0("tbl_", gsub("[^a-zA-Z0-9]", "_", sample))

  dt <- datatable(
    tbl_data,
    rownames  = FALSE,
    elementId = uid,
    extensions = "Buttons",
    options = list(
      pageLength = 10, scrollX = TRUE,
      dom = "Bfrtip",
      buttons = c("copy", "csv"),
      order = list(list(1, "desc"))),
    colnames = c("Signature", "Global Score", "% Signif",
                 "Coverage %", "Sig. Probes", "Found",
                 "Missing", "Total",
                 if ("Details" %in% colnames(sub))
                   "Details")[seq_along(tbl_cols)]
  ) %>%
    formatStyle(
      "Global_Score",
      background = styleColorBar(
        c(0, max(sub$Global_Score, 1)), "lightgreen"),
      backgroundSize = "98% 88%",
      backgroundRepeat = "no-repeat",
      backgroundPosition = "center"
    ) %>%
    formatStyle(
      "Pct_Significant",
      background = styleColorBar(
        c(0, max(sub$Pct_Significant, 1)), "lightblue"),
      backgroundSize = "98% 88%",
      backgroundRepeat = "no-repeat",
      backgroundPosition = "center"
    )

  print(htmltools::tagList(dt))
  cat("\n\n---\n\n")
}
```

---

# Methodology

```{r methodology}
div(class = "method-box",
    h3("Statistical Approach"),

    h4("1. M-value Transformation"),
    p("Beta values are converted to M-values for statistical",
      " normality:"),
    p(tags$code("M = log2(beta / (1 - beta))")),
    p("Values are clipped to [0.00001, 0.99999] to avoid",
      " infinite M-values."),

    h4("2. Z-score Calculation"),
    p("Each probe's M-value is compared to the internal control",
      " cohort:"),
    p(tags$code("Z = (M_patient - mean_controls) / sd_controls")),

    h4("3. Significance"),
    p("A probe is significant if its two-tailed P-value < 0.05."),

    hr(),
    h3("Metrics"),

    tags$table(
      class = "table table-striped",
      style = "font-size: 13px;",
      tags$thead(tags$tr(
        tags$th("Metric"), tags$th("Formula"),
        tags$th("Interpretation"))),
      tags$tbody(
        tags$tr(
          tags$td(strong("Global Score")),
          tags$td("Significant / Total_Probes * 100"),
          tags$td("Most robust. Penalizes missing probes.")),
        tags$tr(
          tags$td(strong("% Significant")),
          tags$td("Significant / Found * 100"),
          tags$td("Relative to available probes only.")),
        tags$tr(
          tags$td(strong("Coverage %")),
          tags$td("Found / Total_Probes * 100"),
          tags$td("How much of the signature is present.")),
        tags$tr(
          tags$td(strong("Delta Beta")),
          tags$td("Beta_patient - Mean_Beta_controls"),
          tags$td("Direction and magnitude of change."))
      )
    )
)
```

---

# Session Info

```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```
